base_url.description: VWO API base URL. Defaults to the public VWO API v2 host (confirmed current and correct against the live OpenAPI spec published at developers.wingify.com, which documents the identical https://app.wingify.com/api/v2 host family).

api_key.description: VWO personal API token, generated at https://app.wingify.com/#/developers/tokens. Pass B correction: the real, currently-documented API's OpenAPI security scheme is an apiKey header named 'token' (bare token value, no prefix) -- sent as 'token: <api_key>' -- NOT the 'Authorization: Token <api_key>' shape this bundle previously (and legacy) sent. Never logged.

account_id.description: VWO workspace/account id used as the {account_id} path segment on every request (Pass B correction: the real API's campaigns endpoints are ALWAYS account-scoped, e.g. /accounts/{account_id}/campaigns -- legacy's bare /campaigns path targeted a URL shape the real API does not expose). Defaults to the literal 'current', VWO's own documented keyword for 'the Main Workspace of the authenticated token' -- so no additional required config is introduced versus legacy's zero-config behavior. Set to a specific numeric workspace id to target a sub-account instead.

start_date.description: Optional start_date query parameter passed through to the campaigns endpoint verbatim (RFC3339). Not used as a stateful incremental cursor by legacy. NOTE: this is not a real VWO query parameter (the real 'Get all campaigns' endpoint has no date-range filter at all -- see docs.md); it is preserved here only for config-shape backward compatibility with the original migration and is a silent no-op against the real API, same as it always effectively was.

campaign_type.description: Optional campaign-type filter, sent as the real API's 'type' query parameter only when configured (Pass B full-surface expansion of the campaigns endpoint's documented type filter).

platform.description: Optional platform filter, sent as the real API's 'platform' query parameter only when configured (Pass B full-surface expansion).

page_size.description: Sent as the real API's 'limit' query parameter (Pass B full-surface expansion). VWO's documented default is 25.
